citations.narrative:
The licensee consigned 2 arctic foxes on 11-19-2025 at a Missouri auction (5-H). The current USDA license does not
authorize regulated activity for (consigning/selling) wild canids. Prior to conducting regulated activity with wild canids, a
license must specifically authorize the use of wild canids. Ensure to have a license that authorizes regulated activity for
certain species prior to selling/consigning such species.
***Maintain correct from 6/2/2026 forward.

citations.desc: Procurement of dogs, cats, and other animals; dealers.
citations.narrative:
Two North American opossums were acquired from a facility on 5/26/2026 that is not USDA-licensed and then sold to
individuals as pets with the understanding that since both facilities have DNR licenses for this species they could be
acquired. Acquiring and selling North American opossums as pets is USDA-regulated and requires each entity (breeder
and dealer) to be USDA-licensed. For regulated animals, ensure that they are obtained only from a facility/person that
holds a current, valid, and unsuspended license.
***Correct from 6/2/2026 forward.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.1(b)(2)(ii) 
   
Requirements and application 
The licensee consigned 2 arctic foxes on 11-19-2025 at a Missouri auction (5-H). The current USDA license does not 
authorize regulated activity for (consigning/selling) wild canids. Prior to conducting regulated activity with wild canids, a 
license must specifically authorize the use of wild canids. Ensure to have a license that authorizes regulated activity for 
certain species prior to selling/consigning such species.  
***Maintain correct from 6/2/2026 forward. 
2.132(d) 
   
Procurement of dogs, cats, and other animals; dealers. 
Two North American opossums were acquired from a facility on 5/26/2026 that is not USDA-licensed and then sold to 
individuals as pets with the understanding that since both facilities have DNR licenses for this species they could be 
acquired. Acquiring and selling North American opossums as pets is USDA-regulated and requires each entity (breeder 
and dealer) to be USDA-licensed. For regulated animals, ensure that they are obtained only from a facility/person that 
holds a current, valid, and unsuspended license. 
***Correct from 6/2/2026 forward. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative. 
 
 n
